actions.asset: OasisNative 1.5.1 build 7 binary with iOS 17 deployment target
actions.notes: Upload the 1.5.1 build 7 binary so the public App Store requirement drops from iOS 18+ to iOS 17+. Fastlane archive succeeded on 2026-05-22, but App Store export/upload failed because local signing credentials are missing or invalid: no iOS Distribution certificate found, Xcode keychain credentials missing Xcode-Username/Xcode-Token.

actions.asset: Multilingual Search Results exact-match ramp across en/fr/de/es/it/pt-BR
actions.notes: Start only if organic/community pace is below target after day 3. Use the generated Apple Ads pack with per-market hard caps, Search Match off, localized exact keywords, and a total guardrail of 900 for the first ramp window.

actions.asset: 230-slot 30-day publishing queue across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Bluesky, Mastodon, X, Reddit, and Hacker News
actions.notes: Execute through dispatch-due-posts.mjs daily. YouTube/Bluesky/Mastodon can publish through official APIs when credentials are present; TikTok/Instagram/Facebook/X use native/approved schedulers; Reddit/HN remain human-reviewed.

actions.asset: Manual outreach pack for iOS curators, sleep/focus creators, and regional app/newsletter curators
actions.notes: Generated through build-outreach-pack.mjs. Send manually only, personalize every pitch, disclose developer connection, and record live mentions or sent pitches with campaign-specific outreach tokens.

actions.asset: One coordinated Product Hunt launch centered on no subscription, offline sounds, and spatial audio
actions.notes: Manual launch only. Prepare founder comment, maker assets, and first-hour supporter list; do not automate votes, comments, DMs, or cross-posting.
